brief_notes: Reproductive neuroscience paper on PMv LepRb glutamate. Extensive data (80 stat sentences in extraction). Key numbers verified: n=15 PMv-hit, n=7 negative control, 55% (8/15) showed LH increase, F2,19=81.66 p<0.0001 for cFos, Pearson r=0.67 p=0.0007, CNO 0.5mg/kg, 28.5% (2/7), body mass F1,10=13.1 p=0.0047, Tac2 t8=3.39 p=0.009, kisspeptin AUC t11=3.14 p=0.009. 6 figures. 16 citations somewhat light given data richness.
